lines.speaker: JAXON
lines.line: Another dead body, another case gone cold.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: LUNA
lines.line: Jaxon, I think we have a lead on the latest victim.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON, his eyes squinting from the rain as he lights a cigarette.

lines.speaker: JAXON
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of LUNA, her eyes gleaming with intensity as she steps into the light.

lines.speaker: LUNA
lines.line: A cryptic message on the comms system. It reads: 'Eclipse is coming.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of JAXON, his eyes narrowing as he takes a drag on his cigarette.

lines.speaker: JAXON
lines.line: Sounds like a bunch of hype to me. Eclipse is just a myth.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of LUNA, her eyes scanning JAXON's face for a reaction.

lines.speaker: KIARA
lines.line: I didn't mean to see it. I didn't mean to hear it.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of KIARA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: VICTOR
lines.line: You're the one who's been snooping around, Kiara. I should've known.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of KIARA, her eyes welling up with tears as she whispers into her comms device.

lines.speaker: LUNA
lines.line: Jaxon, I think we're looking at a bigger picture here. This Eclipse thing is more than just a myth.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of LUNA, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: JAXON
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of LUNA, her eyes locked intently on JAXON's face as she leans in.

lines.speaker: LUNA
lines.line: I think it's a warning. A warning that something big is coming, something that could change the course of the city's history.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of JAXON, his eyes narrowing as he sets down his pen.

lines.speaker: JAXON
lines.line: And you think this message on the comms system is the key to it all?
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of LUNA, her eyes burning with determination as she leans in closer.
